history.content:
<thought>
The goal is not visible in the current view, but there are no obstacles directly in front of me. However, the cell in front of me contains lava, which is dangerous. I need to find a safe path to the goal. I will turn right to explore the right side of my current position.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell in front of me contains lava, and turning right would also lead to lava cells. Turning left would help me explore the other side of the current view. Given that the cells to the right all contain lava, I need to explore downwards to find a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell in front of me contains lava, and turning right would also lead to lava cells. Since turning left would not provide any new information and could potentially lead to lava, I should move forward to explore the cell directly in front of me, which is currently unknown.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
